data.body: 25aa GREEN (top of stack): extracted pure helpers _compact_policy.is_foldable + _push_policy.normalize_push_mode (behavior-preserving; existing compaction/push suites pass), added focused kill-suites, wired only_mutate + test-selection, ran mutmut 3.6.0 -> both shards 100% (7/7, 8/8 mutants killed, 0 survivors). Doc updated: Scope table + mapping + 2026-07-12 shard scores + rewritten caveat (fold+push now sharded; sync-branch-selection + lock stale-owner DESCOPED w/ follow-up note). mutmut NOT added to deps. lint+typecheck clean. Committing stacked on 2da6.
